entry.title: ABAP2XLSX in an old Abap version
entry.content:
Hello there.

I want to use ABAP2XLSX but my system have an old version of ABAP: 701.

I cannot activate the report ZABAPGIT_STANDALONE, it's using new syntax...

Any tip how to install ABAP2XLSX without ZABAPGIT ?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration with Slack
entry.content:
Hello Priyanka,

It is a nice blog. Ca you share how to send Direct Message to Slack?

entry.title: Receive a notification when your storage quota of SAP Cloud Transport Management passes 85%
entry.content:
If you are using SAP Cloud Transport Management service on SAP BTP, you might welcome a new option added this week to receive notifications when your storage quota has increased over the threshold of 85% of the total storage capacity. The actual notification is then sent via SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP.

This way, you can make sure to clean up your import queues in your transport landscape in time, before hitting your storage limit of your SAP Cloud Transport Management instance, which is currently 50 GB for our standard plan.

To clean up:

  • Either make sure to import transport requests in all import queues of your transport landscape (so the attached content gets deleted by the automatic cleanup mechanism of our service, after the retention time, which is 30 days for our standard plan),
  • Or remove outdated and obsolete transport requests from all import queues. Here, especially pay attention to transport requests in status Fatal, because the cleanup mechanism doesn't automatically delete them.

For more information on the capacity and cleanup of our persistency, see Background Information: Storage Capacity | SAP Help Portal.

To enable the notification, you first have to set up and connect SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP (if not already done, for other notification use cases) - and then just select the Enable Notification checkbox under  <Your e-mail address> --> My File Quota, as shown on the following screenshot:

Screenshot of the UI, showing how to navigate to the notification option.

 

For more information, on how to set up and connect SAP Alert Notification service and on how to enable specific notifications (also for the other events from SAP Cloud Transport Management you can get notifications for), see Receive Notifications for SAP Cloud Transport Management Actions Using SAP Alert Notification Service | SAP Help Portal. 

Please be aware that although you find the option for the storage quota notification underneath your email address in SAP Cloud Transport Management service, you will receive the notification via the channel defined in SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP (which might be email, Slack, Microsoft Teams, ...).

Also, this is not a personal notification, but you switch on the notification for the instance of SAP Cloud Transport Management, for which the storage limit does apply. If you should have several instances of SAP Cloud Transport Management, each instance would have a own storage limit. As a result, all recipients defined in SAP Alert Notification service for this storage quota event will get notified. For example, all members of a corresponding team in Microsoft Teams or of the Slack channel or on the specified distribution list, depending on the defined notification channel. 

We hope you find this new feature helpful for handling the delivery of your changes with SAP Cloud Transport Management service!

entry.title: Re: SAP PI - Determine the receiver based on Source FileName
entry.content:
Hi Caner,

I selected the Receiver 2 as a default Receiver and when I test it with 2 receiver it works 🙂

But I didnt think it would matter but there is also another Receiver where all file should go to. 

So when I add this receiver (receiver 3) than the files dont go to default receiver (Receiver 2) anymore. 

Any idea why is that? And how to solve it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: CCM - Settlement to multiple agents - No Supplier to...
entry.content:
Hello @gvictor,

Thanks for the response.

I have made the necessary configurations including the one which you have mentioned 'Make sure to change the "Type of contract partner" to "No contract partner"'. I am maintaining suppliers in BVS. Also, business is aware of points 1-4 mentioned by you.

In our billing document, we have partner function ES which has been assigned to LIFNR_COMMISSION. I have used LIFNR_COMMISSION in split criteria. Somehow by mistake, i posted a screenshot with LIFNR. 

When I do delta accruals instead of accruals from billing document (i.e, create invoices first and contract later), final settlement works fine.

Issue is only when accruals are from billing document and when final settlement is executed via WB2R_SV, then the error appears.

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP ADT installation issue
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you had a chance to check out the installation guide? You can find it right here: Installing ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse.

If you're still having troubles after going through the guide, you could also open a ticket with the component BC-DWB-AIE. Hope this helps!

Best regards,
Armin

entry.title: Error by Logon eclipse
entry.content:
Hello SAP Comunity, 

I have a free Trail account . I am currently facing a problem while trying to log on my ABAP Cloud project in eclipse. I am getting the following error : Error while logging on the service instance using this project. Please make sure that you are logging on with : my email address. Although I simultaneously get the following message im Browser:  You have been successfully logged on: You can close this page and continue in the ABAP Development Tools. 

The trial account has only one E-mail Address. 

Yesterday, it was working perfectly but I tried the wohle day to relog in eclipse , restart it , restart windows, deleted the data in cache. But nothing seems to work unfortuantly. 

Thanks in advance

Best regards 

sisi

entry.title: Re: SAP Disclosure Management for EFRAG taxonomy
entry.content:
Dear Andrea,

Yes, you can tag a concept with as many dimension as you like.

Regarding the second criteria, I'm not sure what you mean.

Do you mean an expression for a boolean concept (yes or no) ?

Regards,

Guido

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to call a SAP Query Transaction from another report and import to it the data?
entry.content: Did you try to use FM RSAQ_QUERY_CALL or RSAQ_REMOTE_QUERY_CALL to execute the query, there is an option to export result to memory (actually an exported parameter of type ref to).

entry.title: Re: Change header field of purchase order on save
entry.content:
If you actually want a constant value, try to add your code in methods OPEN to initialize value) and PROCESS_HEADER (cancel user input)

NB: POST method shouldn't change data, CHECK is the last one allowed.

entry.title: Re: Doubt - SAP IBP Cost Roll Up calculation
entry.content: Thanks for the input, I wasn't taking into account the aggregation transportation costs withinn the other supply chain nodes, now it makes sense. So, as I understand it, I should always make the cost analysis starting from the supplier and then to the plant with the customer demand need, right? Another question, how does the cost roll up profile takes into account the projected stock? For example, if I have in the last period a projected stock of 100 and this period I have Total Receipt=300 and NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONCOST=500. Thanks, Elena

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Form Cell Header reference
entry.content: @sk_ramkumar Could you open a feature request on influence site to track your requirement? https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2279

entry.title: Re: FB60 does not post. No error message is displayed.
entry.content:
The error doesn't point to a missing value, but a forgotten dynpro in your recording/BDC.

  • Try to execute the BDC in 'E' or 'A' mode.

entry.content: T052U (table) or I_PaymentTermsConditionsText (CDS) for descriptions.

entry.title: Re: Change header field of purchase order on save
entry.content: Thanks, but is not a constant value, it should be set before saving.

entry.title: Re: SAP BW - Master Data Delta Load
entry.content:
Regards venkatesh

Speaking of master data, Cut Over activities depend on the changes you made.

If you only added attributes, it is just a matter of importing the changes to production and loading the new data. If it is a delta load, the new field will begin to fill little by little.

If you modified existing attributes (for example, data type change) you must validate that these attributes are not used in cubes/ADSO so that you can import your changes. If it exists in a cube/ADSO, you must first delete the content of the cubes to be able to import the changes (due to SIDS management issues).

I hope to be helpful. Greetings.

BR Oscar A.

entry.title: Re: Unable to print a billing document (AdobeForms) in VF02
entry.content: Though you confirmed that all SAP notes are there in system, when checked in Service Marketplace, I could see 8 notes are there related to this Message text.  Do you mean to say all these 8 Notes are implemented.  If not, check which one is missing and if needed, raise a ticket to SAP

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM MFS Receiving and Processing Telegrams
entry.content:
@TobiasAdler: Do you have any experience with using RFC 1006 "Iso on TCP". Is EWM MFS compatible  with it ? In my understanding the ABAP Push Channel is compatible with the protocol.

The EWM MFS component i guess not. Therfore the Message handling needs to extendend. Like in method /SCWM/CL_APC_EXT_MFS_TCP_PLC->IF_APC_WSP_EXTENSION~ON_MESSAGE.

entry.title: Re: Usage of Custom Destination Service in BTP, ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hey @Koni,

Thanks for your comment.

You can run this ABAP Code in an ABAP Environment on the BTP, there you always program in ABAP Cloud programming model. Here is a collection of links that show you how to setup an ABAP environment in a trial account and run your own code:

Learn how to develop in ABAP using SAP BTP ABAP En... - SAP Community

Basically you can run this type of code in an application job, in an action of a RAP BO or in an ADT Class Runner.

if you want to use this code in consuming an OData service, check out this post: Usage of Expand Entity in OData Service Consumptio... - SAP Community

alrikx

entry.title: Auto close/update all open Notifications work orders and maintenance plans for Decommissioned asset
entry.content: How we can achieve this please let me know

entry.title: Re: Sales order line item rejected even though MTO Produc...
entry.content: Yes, it has the same requirements type on the sales order and it has the same assembly type assigned

entry.title: Providing As-a-Service with Software-as-a-Service - give us feedback
entry.content:
Software-as-a-Service has emerged to be the main monetization model for software companies. Newer software companies, such as Leadsquare, would not even consider to provide their competence by selling perpetual licenses. The key requirement for all companies launching SaaS is to be quick, efficient and automated while still agile to change and adapt. Can the solution deal with different subscription models? Is it able to provide subscriptions with other one-off products or service in a bundle? Will the revenue recognition be compliant to local standards? We at SAP strive to provide enterprise ressource planning from the cloud with true SaaS qualities, that provides the management of subscriptions. 

Let us know about your subscription business: Are you running SAP for it? What can we do better? What shall we keep? What do you really like about our solution?

Thank you in advance !

Axel Vetter

entry.title: Re: Unable to debug Custom function module in CG54.
entry.content:
In the above WWI code.

I am pushing the specification number using stack push.

Then in my custom FM I am reading the stack top to get back the spec number.

I want to debug my custom FM to check some part of logic, since it is not giving the expected result.

I have add  external and session breakpoint in STACK PUSH FM

I have also add break point statement and external and session breakpoint in my custom FM.

When I click on the display document as explained earlier debugger gets triggered for the stack push FM but my custom FM is not being triggered.

entry.title: Re: Unable to debug Custom function module in CG54.
entry.content: Hello @Christoph_bergemann.

entry.title: Re: Unable to debug Custom function module in CG54.
entry.content: I have added my explanation in answer section please check and help me on the same.

entry.title: Re: CIG transaction tracker handling
entry.content:
1. It doesn't seem to be possible to be actively informed about errors (e.g. in case of failed status) and to set up any scheduled reports
-> That means it seems to be necessary to login to CIG on a regular basis and manually search for documents or download the list in excel [Mridul: Thats correct, as of now, CIG doesn't provide option to schedule any reports or jobs to get the list of error/transactions etc.]

2. If you download a list of documents, the error message in case of failed status is not part of the list at all
-> You can only see document errors by using mouseover function for each document. This highly increases the analysis effort [Mridul: I agree list doesn't provide details about failed transaction. I would suggest raising Enhancement Request with SAP]

3. It is not possible to do any kind of clearing in CIG (delete / obsolete failed documents)
-> That means it is impossible to keep track of which documents have been already cleaned up and which still require attention [Mridul: I didn't your questions, are you are saying once transaction is reprocessed, you can see audit history of this transaction ID?]

4. Maximum document number to be downloaded in excel is 5000
-> currently we exchange already more than 5000 documents per day. As we just have migrated 25% of our suppliers to CIG, this number will extremely grow. We can't download a list several times a day to track documents.  [Mridul: Considering the performance to run heavy queries, product team designed to limit 5000 documents in one excel export run]

entry.title: Question about notification in SAPS/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a requirement from customer for example, when the new products are being added into SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, how would the customer be notified they have to add the price to the added materials and also the sales price to it?

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales MM (Materials Management) SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: How to the find the usage of a Fiori app from the bac...
entry.content:
In my opinion, Focused Run / Real User Monitoring (SAP Focused Run Expert Portal) provides good insights.

I'm not experienced how to find a comparable insight with other tooling such as transactions ST03N (2629143 - Best practices to gather Fiori usage statistics for on-premise systems - SAP for Me), STATS_FE (Use Transaction STATS_FE to Analyze the Performance of your Web Application) or STMC (Technical Monitoring in the ABAP Platform | SAP Help Portal). 

Kind regards, Bas

entry.title: You are not authorized to make changes (authorization object S_ABPLNGVS)
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I created (or better) copied an interface from z-namespace to customer-namespace in BTP ABAP Environment.

I cannot activate or delete the object and get an error message "You are not authorized to make changes (authorization object S_ABPLNGVS)". I checked also note https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3303363. I have all write permissions and the ABAP Language is "ABAP for Cloud Development". I can see that the Transport Request is "Local".

This is wrong and may cause the problem. When checking the correct TR, I can see the object

Does anyone know, how to solve this issue?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Why Don't We Use Data and Analytics Group on SAP Community?
entry.content:
Hey Data and Analytics Folks! Why Don't We Use Data and Analytics Group on SAP Community instead of Technology?

Of course, it does not matter at the end. As long as if you tag your posts with SAP Managed tags everybody can find your posts. But there is a really one huge difference for usability that here in Interests Groups we can reply-the-reply but under Products and Technology we cannot! Check out this blog post SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW by @kenneth_dalvik and all responses that are very all boring sequential --there is no reply-the-reply option! 🙃

So let's start using this group Here is already available Data and Analytics.   The group will be definitely a perfect fit for SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Datasphere SAP Analytics Cloud, hybrid analytics SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity SAP Analytics Cloud, analytics designer SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics SAP Business Planning and Consolidation, version for SAP NetWeaver SAP Business Warehouse Accelerator BW (SAP Business Warehouse) SAP BW/4HANA BW SAP BEx Analyzer BW SAP BEx Web SAP ASE - BW Enablement BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing SAP Data Services SAP Data Intelligence SAP Data Custodian SAP Big Data Services SAP BusinessObjects - Platform Administration SAP BusinessObjects - Semantic Layer SAP BusinessObjects Mobile SAP BusinessObjects - Semantic Layer - SDK SAP BusinessObjects - Web Intelligence (WebI) 

These are welcome too SAP Master Data Governance SAP NetWeaver Master Data Management SAP Data Quality Management for SAP NetWeaver MDM 

One thing I've noticed we cannot submit the blog posts directly. We need to "Submit for Review" only. You can still post discussions aka questions directly. 

Thanks owners @ColinC, @meganhoy, @moshenaveh, @caroleighdeneen, @craigcmehil for their support!

Regards,
Tuncay Karaca

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP - Job launch suggestion
entry.content:
Hi Gerardo,

Thank you for the nice idea!

May I kindly ask you to enter this in our customer influence tool for IBP. That way other customers can view it and vote on your idea. If it receives many votes it will be considered for implementation.

You can find our tool here for submitting new ideas:
Influence Opportunity Homepage - Customer Influence - SAP IBP

Thanks and regards,
Zoltan.

entry.title: Re: How long do I need to wait for a blog post that I submitted for review in Data and Analytics gro
entry.content: Hi @TuncayKaraca , it is now published 🙂

I don't have access to your system but I guess the system is trying to reverse the accrual and create a settlement document which is not linked to any of the supplier you're using. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: CIG transaction tracker handling

entry.content:
Hi Arif,

Kindly google it out and you will find enormous threads for the topics you are covered. 

Sample: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/scheduling-types-in-pm-order/qaq-p/8484475

Additionally, there is a documentation in each Config node, which will give the information what you are looking for .

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: S/4Hana Cloud Event Trigger an Iflow in Sap Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello, this 4 week old Blog by a SAP employee proposes using SAP 'Event Mesh' classic, but it would appear that this Service has been stealthily retired since :

https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/serviceCatalog/event-mesh?region=all

Is it possible that SAP has retired 'Event Mesh' classic in the past week or so without even the knowledge of its own employees ?

entry.title: Re: Release Question: Comparing Previous Months
entry.content: Hi Jim, I will make sure this gets addressed in the next APM user group meeting (if not before).

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX in an old Abap version
entry.content: You will also have the same kind of syntax errors with ABAP2XLSX because it's supported only from ABAP 7.02. Install a trial, install abapGit, install abap2xlsx. That's it.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to get my PM orders with a basic start...
entry.content:
Hi Deepak,

I guess my answer is incorrect to SAP behavior. Let me brief it.

When the Order is created through Maintenance plan, the priority is copied but the dates are not influenced, so the basic start and finish date will be based on the planned date in the scheduling.

In case if you need to have the dates based on your priority, you need to do an enhancement on Order Save, so when the order is saved, the date gets influenced. By standard, the planned date will be Basic Start date and finish date is calculated based on the scheduling parameter.

Typically, this behavior right, since the Order dates will be influenced based on scheduling parameters only.

As per SAP 332625, this functionality not available in standard,

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to call a SAP Query Transaction from another report and import to it the data?
entry.content: It has been already asked and answered many times in the forum, with all details.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: How I can have access set up on Cloud ALM?
entry.content:
Hello,

To create another users to access the Cloud ALM tenant we need to follow the note:

0003124328 - SAP Cloud ALM Onboarding How-to video playlist

Also, make sure that this user is maintained on SAP Identity Authentication Service tenant as described on note:

0003121352 - How to create and onboard SAP Cloud ALM Users in your SAP Identity Authentication Service tenant?

 

On the note above have the how-to assign roles to these users.

 

Best regards,

Carolina

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Welcome to Career Corner
entry.content:
I'm a graduate in Human Resource Management with practical HR experience. I've completed training in SAP HCM and SuccessFactors EC, and I recently obtained my certification in SuccessFactors. I am committed to continuous learning and am currently expanding my knowledge in the field.

I'm seeking advice on how to land my first opportunity in this area. Most of the job openings I come across require prior experience. Does anyone have tips on how to break into the field or suggestions for positions that are open to newcomers?

Thank you in advance for your guidance and support!

entry.title: Re: Fleet Management SAP PM - two fuel cards
entry.content: Not sure about this, you can wait for other experts response.

entry.title: Re: Auto close/update all open Notifications work orders...
entry.content:
Hi,

There is no standard option, you need to develop a custom program to perform this. Recently i came across Robotic process automation, using this you can do this.

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Integration object creation with one to one relation...
entry.content:
The problem is that you marked "relatedProduct" attribute as 'unique' (a key). If you change that to "unique=false", the integration object should be created.

The problem why circular references are not allowed in key attributes is because that makes an infinite loop for key attributes definition and the key attributes (where unique=true) are used for the item search. Imagine this:

there is a Product A with code 'a' and relatedProduct being Product B with code 'b' and relatedProduct being Product A. Let's say integration API processes a POST payload for Product A and needs to find an existing product by its key. It builds the key `code='a' AND relatedProduct=Product B`, but for the search the key cannot contain complex types, i.e. Product B, and should be flattened to primitives only (that's what the database contains), so in reality the key is `code='a' AND relatedProduct.code='b' AND relatedProduct.relatedProduct.code='a' AND relatedProduct.relatedProduct.relatedProduct.code='b'.....`

For comparison, this is how a typical Product key looks based on the Product unique attributes defined in the type system (items.xml): `code = 'a' AND catalogVersion.version = 'Staged' AND catalogVersion.catalog.id = 'Default'`

Note, Product has two unique attribute "code:String" and "catalogVersion:CatalogVersion". CatalogVersion also has two unique attributes : "version:String" and "catalog:Catalog"; and finally Catalog has only one key attribute "id". You can see how these relationships are flattened into a search key in the expression above.

Hope this clarifies.

entry.title: Transcation codes in S4HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,
We are moving to S4. Following tcodes were being used in ECC. How do we know whether the same tcodes will be available in S4 also? Please guide if there is any place we can check their counterparts.

SE80
SICF
WSADMIN
WSCONFIG
SLDAPICUST
SXMB_ADM_BPE
SMICM
SOAMANAGER
SLDCHECK
SM58
SMQ1
SMQ2
SPROXY
SXMB_ADM
SM37
SMQ3
ST22
SBWP
SU53
/IWBEP/ERROR_LOG
/IWBEP/ERROR_LOG_E2E
/IWBEP/TRACES
/IWBEP/VIEW_LOG
/IWFND/CACHE_CLEANUP
/IWFND/ERROR_LOG
/IWFND/TRACES
SRTIDOC
SRTLOG_E2E
SRT_ADMIN
SRT_CHANGE
SRT_DISPLAY
SRT_LOG
SRT_MONI
SRT_MONIS
SRT_SEQ_MONITOR
SRT_TEST
SRT_TOOLS
SRT_UTIL
SXMB_MONI
SOST
SXI_MONITOR
SXMSIF
/IWBEP/SB
SEGW
BD87
WE02
WE09
WE05
WE07
WE20
WE21
WLF_IDOC
SXMB_MONI_BPE
/IWBEP/CACHE_CLEANUP
/IWXBE/ERROR_LOG

entry.title: Re: New Financial Accounting for Service Management in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
HI Patrick,

the advanced execution scenario is only available in on premise and not described here.

yes there is an aggregated reporting for the service order possible. with selection of the service order you get the billed revenue and revenue recognition on the service order and the costs on the PM order. This is possible, because we attribute in the PM order journal entries the service order item and its market segment - like we do it in the service contract scenario.  A settlement is not required.

Regards stefan

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm a graduate in Human Resource Management with practical HR experience. I've completed training in SAP HCM and SuccessFactors EC, and I recently obtained my certification in SuccessFactors. I am committed to continuous learning and am currently expanding my knowledge in the field.

I'm seeking advice on how to land my first opportunity in this area. Most of the job openings I come across require prior experience. Does anyone have tips on how to break into the field or suggestions for positions that are open to newcomers?

Thank you in advance for your guidance and support!

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS Views - FAQ
entry.content:
How can do I  create a column with "Prior Year Calculation" for analytical purpose ?

Hello Dear 

I have a requirement as stated below and I would like to know if I can use the new  Custom CDS View app to fulfill my requirement without major technical issue. I would like to copy an existing  Data source that I intend to modify. I want to have three Columns:

  • One column reading :Current Year/Period YTD amount
  • One Colum reading : Prior Year/Period YTD amount
  • One Column reading:  Prior Year END amount.

    I am  having difficulty finding a suitable CDS view from Custom Analytical Queries app with fiscal year shift, so SAP advice me to create a custom CDS view but I am wondering if I am obligated  to use  ADT based tools of the developer extensibility or Custom CDS Views app .

    In case I need to use the CDS view app which I find less complex, Can you provided some guidance on how to create fiscal shift across column.

    Thank!

entry.title: SAP Commerce Best Practices for Performance
entry.content:
In the dynamic world of e-commerce, where milliseconds can make or break a customer's online experience, the performance of your digital commerce platform is non-negotiable.

Recognizing the importance of a high-performing SAP Commerce Cloud, our team of experts has curated a comprehensive set of resources to optimize your platform for unparalleled performance. Welcome to our dedicated page on "Performance Optimization Best Practices" – your gateway to unlocking the full potential of your digital commerce infrastructure.

 

Why Performance Matters?

The success of any online business depends on its ability to deliver a seamless and speedy user experience. Slow loading times, sluggish response rates, or system downtimes can translate into lost revenue and dissatisfied customers. It's not just about meeting expectations; it's about exceeding them. That's where our expertise comes into play.

Some of the examples that you will find in our portal are next:

1. How to Reduce CPU Utilization on SAP Commerce Cloud

2. How to Reduce Memory Utilization on SAP Commerce Cloud

3. How to Reduce Database Storage on SAP Commerce Cloud

4. Using Dynatrace to Manage and Optimize the Performance of Your SAP Commerce Cloud Solution

5. Top 10 Recommendations for Improving the Performance of Your Commerce Cloud Promotion Engine

6. Best Tips to Reduce Build Time of SAP Commerce Cloud

 

Who Can Benefit?

Whether you're a seasoned SAP Commerce Cloud customer looking to fine-tune your existing setup or a newcomer embarking on your digital commerce journey, our page is designed to cover your needs. Our resources are crafted to be accessible and beneficial to businesses at all stages, ensuring everyone can harness SAP Commerce Cloud's power to its fullest potential.

As the digital commerce landscape evolves, staying ahead of the performance curve is not just an advantage—it's a necessity. Our Performance Optimization Best Practices page is your one-stop destination for unlocking the true potential of your commerce platform. Dive into our articles to revolutionize how your business performs in the digital realm. Explore, implement, and witness the transformative power of optimized performance.


If you want to know more about different CX Solutions, join us by subscribing to the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps program. Access expert guidance, best practices, and a thriving community to optimize your SAP experience. Visit this link for more information and to subscribe today!

entry.title: Re: How to add dynamically formcell or button table in Se...
entry.content:
You cannot redefine the current page metadata after it is rendered like you are trying to do.  If you want to dynamically add additional controls you would need to navigate to a new page.

The typical way to handle this would be to include the controls in the original page but have them hidden using the Visible property.  Then when you have the updated data you can show the additional controls rather than navigating to a new page.

entry.title: Re: SAP BW - Master Data Delta Load
entry.content:
Hello @venkatesh_veera2

I don't see the need to block users but I do see the need to debug the delta queue in RSA7 before importing the changes to production.

Greetings and good luck

Oscar A.

entry.title: Global filter definition for Country Compliance WTPA forms
entry.content:
Introduction

New York Notice of Pay Rate - WTPA form, unlike other country compliance forms, presents a unique challenge as it lacks standard or pre-defined mapping. To ensure smooth implementation, let's explore the essential setup steps required before utilising this form.

#Notice of Pay Rate  https://dol.ny.gov/notice-pay-rate

 

Setting up Global Filter override configuration

New York has multiple WTPA forms depending on the type of wage earned by a new hire.

However, for a given time and candidate, only one WTPA form will be assigned.

The initial step involves identifying the decisive field that determines this value or establishing business rules to determine the type of form to be assigned.

Introducing the new Global filter field, "filterkey1", designed specifically for managing WTPA form assignment for New hires

Here we will outline the definition of a global filter in two distinct scenarios.

Scenario 1: Direct field which can holds WTPA form name

Step 1 : Identify a field from existing HRIS element, which can holds WTPA Form name.

Navigate to “Manage Business Configuration” page, expand the required entity and make sure the identified field is enabled and editable.

Step 2: Provide view and edit permission 

Navigate to "Manage Permission Roles" page and 'Edit' the right user role for admin user - who carries out NHDR step.

In Edit page, go to User Permissions -> Employee Central Effective Dated Entities, make sure atleast View and Edit permissions are provided for field which is considered in step 1.

 

Step 3:  Global filter override fieldMetadata path definition

Refer section "Configuring Wage Theft Protection Act (WTPA) Forms" from Onboarding help portal (link) for details on field metadata Override definition. 

Field Metadata Override should be defined for ID “filterkey1” (case sensitive) and the overriding field should hold WTPA form name.

Considered values for Overriding fields – LS51, LS54, LS55, LS56, LS57 & LS59.

 

Step 4: Data Maintenance during New Hire Data Review (NHDR) step

In below example overriding field is a Dropdown, in your scenario you can have a string field and directly maintain the above mentioned considered values.

For eg: if customString3 = LS51, then WTPA LS51 form will be assigned to candidate,

Else if customString3 = LS59, then WTPA LS59 form will be assigned to candidate.

 

Scenario 2: No direct field which can hold WTPA form name

When there isn't a direct field that contain WTPA form names, the same must be derived from existing standard fields. This can be accomplished through the definition of business rules.

Step 1: Business Rule definition

Navigate to 'Configure Business Rule' and create a new rule tailored to your scenario and relevant category.

Here is an example of defining a Business Rule to derive the WTPA Form name. In this case, the WTPA form names are determined based on the values of the Employment Type field and then stored in one of the reserved or custom fields in the Job Info entity.

 

Above Business rule works as below,

If field 'Employment Type US' = U1, then 'WTPA NY Form Filter' (customString1) field = LS51

Else if 'Employment Type US' = U5, then 'WTPA NY Form Filter' (customString1) field  = LS54

Else if 'FLSA Status' = Exempt, then 'WTPA NY Form Filter' (customString1) field  = LS59

Step 2:  Addition of Business rule to HRIS element:

Navigate to the "Manage Business Configuration" page and include the newly defined business rule in the "Trigger Rules" section. In the example below, the business rule will be triggered "On Save," meaning it will trigger when Job Information entity is saved.

 

Step 3: Provide view and edit permission

Refer to step 2 outlined in scenario 1 above.

Step 4:  Global filter override fieldMetadata path definition

Refer to step 3 outlined in scenario 1 above. The override path for this scenario will be 'customString1'.

 

This field will hold New York WTPA Form names based on Business Rule processing.

For eg: if Employment Type US = U1, then customString1 = LS51, based on which WTPA LS51 form will be assigned to candidate,

Else if Employment Type US = U5, then customString1 = LS54, based on which WTPA LS54 form will be assigned to candidate.

Else if FLSA_STATUS = Exempt, then customString1 = LS59, based on which WTPA LS59 form will be assigned to candidate.

Step 5: Data Maintenance during New Hire Data Review (NHDR) step

For Business Rule defined in step 1 to work, it's essential to maintain data for the "Employment Type US" field. The Business Rule will trigger upon submission of the data and save the calculated or derived value in the "WTPA NY Form Filter" field.

Below screenshot is taken post saving data.

 

Conclusion

The example scenarios provided above serve as reference points and can be utilized to define mappings for your own fields. The business rule logic and custom fields may vary in your implementation.

Once you have completed the steps outlined above, the Global filter will be fully configured, and the WTPA form will be assigned to candidates based on the type of wage they are earning.

Note: In addition to the steps outlined above, it is necessary to configure Overrides for WTPA Form fields. For more information, please refer to the following link 'WTPA Form Fields Configuration'.

entry.content: has the name changed to: Maintain Storage Categories?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA public cloud tenant -> Implementation Co...
entry.content: seems that the name has changed: Maintain Storage Categories

entry.title: Re: Integrate an external task system to Cloud ALM.
entry.content:
Hi Archana_12,

The 302 error is returned by the external Rev-Trac service. As a result, the application External API Management is showing a gateway error to reflect that the external call can't be performed. 

The error is probably at webhook level (and most probably in your BTP destination configuration).

Please ensure API calls would work to this particular external API with a proper authentication. Maybe you can check with an API tool like Postman, bruno or Insomnia. 

The test payload you are sending is supposed to be for a Jira system. Once the service is reachable, you might get a 4xx error but first, you would need to make the API reachable. 

Best regards,
Sophie

entry.title: Re: Deacitivating Business Functions- Multiple Addresses...
entry.content:
Hi Stefan,

No. As mentioned in the documentation, once it is activated, multiple address handling cannot be deactivated. However, activation should not have any disruptive effects. The immediate impact of activation is that partner functions in newly created SD documents will reference addresses maintained in BP master data records instead of the standard addresses maintained in customer master data records.

No business data is changed. The system will still be able to process SD documents created before activation, which reference addresses in customer master data records.

Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Production Operator Dashboard (POD) replacing XSTEPS...
entry.content:
Hi there,

SAP is working on a replacement solution for PI-Sheets. The tool in SAP Digital Manufacturing (DM) for Worker Guidance is planned to be the POD (Production Operator Dashboard). SAP DM already covers a large number of PI-sheet capabilities. For instance, the Guided Steps – Production Process can be used to guide workers through activities in a structured manner. The sequence of steps can be defined in a production process consisting of multiple PlugIns. SAP has a Customer Influence Council (CIC) with multiple engaged customers collaborating on future solutions for PI-Sheet replacements. Depending on the complexity of a customer’s PI-Sheet, it can already be replaced today with SAP DM. For more complex PI-Sheets (e.g., in Life Sciences industries), additional capabilities are on the roadmap. Workarounds and/or custom solutions may be discussed with an implementation partner.

A helpful link is here: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/pod-designer/guided-steps-production-process

 

Best regards,

Stephan Eisenacher

entry.title: SAP Academic Community Conference Turkey (April 17, 2024)
entry.content:
SAP Academic Community Conference Turkey (SAP ACC) was held on April 17th, 2024 in the scope of SAP Innovation Day - largest SAP Event in Turkey attended this year by over 1400 participants. Here you can watch the video summary. 

The main theme of SAP Innovation Day has been "Your Cloud Journey with AI everywhere for Better Business Outcomes". This was also the major topic of our SAP ACC along with Sustainability, Quantum Computing and Industry-Edu collaboration.

During the Event we had the meetings, presentations and discussions with SAP colleagues Tuna Atmaca (SAP Turkey Pre-sales and Solutions Director), Igor Belousov (SAP University Alliances), our academic partners from Turkish German University, Gebze Teknik University, Beykent University, Bahcesehir University, Istanbul Kultur University, our partners and customers from Mercedes-Benz Otomotive, Kardem Tekstil.

Participants of SAP ACC also had the possibility during SAP Innovation Day to attend plenary and parallel sessions, visited booth area to get latest information about SAP BusinessAI, Analytics, BTP, Signavio, Sustainability and other topics. We agreed on the next steps to develop SAP ecosystem in Turkey in these and related directions. SAP University Alliances and SAP Learning resources (Student Zone at LSC, Quick Start Guides) will be used together with curricula provided by SAP UCC at Technical University of Munich.

Plan for 2024 includes innovation projects with Turkish customers and partners.

entry.title: How to manage two credit limits for one customer in same sales area ?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I want to manage two credit limits for the same customer in one sales area , I’ve created two credit controls area and two credit segment ( ZY01 ) (ZY02) . 
Let say we create a sales order with two items ( A = finished good ) , item b ( packaging) , the requirement is item A should fallow the first segment ZY01 and the item B with the segment ZY02 … 

If any checks failed system would block sales order creation. 

Ps : item A and b have different item category 

 

hope it was clear 

 

thanks .

entry.title: Re: Barcode Control
entry.content:
Hello,

I am displaying a barcode per line item in a Table.

In the event 'updateFinished' I am looping the table and using a formatter to create a barcode based on another table column's value by leveraging JsBarcode.

The problem is that all the images are overwritten with the last one.

Do you know why?

Thanks,

Javier

entry.title: Re: sap MM
entry.content:
Hello Vijayabhaskar. The return process begins with the creation of a return purchase order and is followed by the outbound delivery. Subsequently the items are picked and shipped to the supplier. Alternatively, you can also directly post a goods issue. The process is closed with the creation of a credit memo, which transfers the liability to the corresponding supplier.

You can learn more with scope item Return to Supplier (BMK) 

  • Create a return purchase order
  • Complete a return/ outbound delivery
  • Pick and post a goods issue in a supply chain
  • Post goods issue directly to vendor without outbound delivery
  • Complete a credit memo
  • Complete a return purchase order in advance
  • Complete a return/ outbound delivery in advance
  • Create pick and post a goods issue in advance for supply chain
  • Complete a credit memo in advance
  • Complete a return purchase order in advance
  • Complete a return/ outbound delivery in advance
  • Complete pick and post a goods issue in a supply chain in advance
  • Create document for Receiving Replacement Material
  • Complete a Posting Goods Receipt
  • Complete activities to follow-up for replacement Material
  • Complete checking Invoice document verification

A goods receipt created in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud system for a purchase order

Goods Movement Type 122 Return deliveries to vendor
Goods Movement Type 124 Return delivery to vendor from GR blocked stock

Return to vendor may involve a store return if the returned materials have to be routed via another location before being shipped to the vendor. Similarly, a store return may involve a return to vendor if the company location receiving the returned materials decides to send them to an external vendor.

For India Localization you can refer to Creating Delivery Challan for Vendor Returns

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/634261119fec4d58970471f2c4a9a740/56c80953afec4871b9ce0622dae3a76f.html?state=TEST&q=%20reject%20material%20and%20%20send%20return%20%28Material%20%20type%3A%20FERT%29%20%20TO%20vendor%3F

entry.title: Re: sap MM
entry.content:
Hello Vijayabhaskar. The return process begins with the creation of a return purchase order and is followed by the outbound delivery. Subsequently the items are picked and shipped to the supplier. Alternatively, you can also directly post a goods issue. The process is closed with the creation of a credit memo, which transfers the liability to the corresponding supplier.

You can learn more with scope item Return to Supplier (BMK) 

  • Create a return purchase order
  • Complete a return/ outbound delivery
  • Pick and post a goods issue in a supply chain
  • Post goods issue directly to vendor without outbound delivery
  • Complete a credit memo
  • Complete a return purchase order in advance
  • Complete a return/ outbound delivery in advance
  • Create pick and post a goods issue in advance for supply chain
  • Complete a credit memo in advance
  • Complete a return purchase order in advance
  • Complete a return/ outbound delivery in advance
  • Complete pick and post a goods issue in a supply chain in advance
  • Create document for Receiving Replacement Material
  • Complete a Posting Goods Receipt
  • Complete activities to follow-up for replacement Material
  • Complete checking Invoice document verification

A goods receipt created in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud system for a purchase order

Goods Movement Type 122 Return deliveries to vendor
Goods Movement Type 124 Return delivery to vendor from GR blocked stock

Return to vendor may involve a store return if the returned materials have to be routed via another location before being shipped to the vendor. Similarly, a store return may involve a return to vendor if the company location receiving the returned materials decides to send them to an external vendor.

For India Localization you can refer to Creating Delivery Challan for Vendor Returns 

You can create a material document for vendor returns where you use Goods movement 122 - Return delivery to vendor and 161 - Returns for purchase order, movement types to create a material document.

You can set up  workflow and validation rules for  products of type Finished Product (MARA-MTART = FERT) which can help with approvals using workflow as necessary. You can explore SAP Build Process Automation  to set up your workflows.

Hope this helps

Thanks

entry.title: Payment/Delivery Consolidation
entry.content:
Hi All

I am implementing Sap B1 in my organisation and I am finding it difficult because the system is so new to us and not fully sure how it works yet!

If I have a group of customers who received separate statements but make 1 payment for all accounts how do I determine this please on SAP B1?  I'm not sure either the delivery or payment consolidation will work for this?

Would appreciate any help you can give me!

Regarding Olivia

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to call a SAP Query Transaction from another report and import to it the data?
entry.content:
It worked perfectly using FM RSAQ_QUERY_CALL

The program SAP_QUERY_DEMO_TRANSFER_1 gave me good examples on how to use it properly. Thank you for suggesting me the FM.

entry.title: Re: FB60 does not post. No error message is displayed.
entry.content: @Raymond_giuseppi thank you for your answer. What do you mean by 'to execute the BDC in 'E' or 'A' mode'? If the error is not connected to the original problem (FB60 does not post) How can I Find why FB60 does not post?

entry.title: SAP scripting findbyID
entry.content:
Hello friends,

I generated an SAP script and it runs perfectly fine when executed from the vbs file however after I convert it to Python, it keeps giving an error (619, 'SAP Frontend Server', 'The control could not be found by id.')... any suggestions? this is the part giving the error, its supposed to select a checkbox in a table in VA13 tcode... thanks!!

VBS

session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_OVERVIEW/tabpT\02/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4411/subSUBSCREEN_TC:SAPMV45A:4912/tblSAPMV45ATCTRL_U_ERF_ANGEBOT").getAbsoluteRow(0).selected = true
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_OVERVIEW/tabpT\02/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4411/subSUBSCREEN_TC:SAPMV45A:4912/tblSAPMV45ATCTRL_U_ERF_ANGEBOT/txtVBAP-POSNR[0,0]").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_OVERVIEW/tabpT\02/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4411/subSUBSCREEN_TC:SAPMV45A:4912/tblSAPMV45ATCTRL_U_ERF_ANGEBOT/txtVBAP-POSNR[0,0]").caretPosition = 1

PYTHON

session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize()

session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_OVERVIEW/tabpT\02/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4411/subSUBSCREEN_TC:SAPMV45A:4912/tblSAPMV45ATCTRL_U_ERF_ANGEBOT").getAbsoluteRow(2).selected = True
 session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_OVERVIEW/tabpT\02/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4411/subSUBSCREEN_TC:SAPMV45A:4912/tblSAPMV45ATCTRL_U_ERF_ANGEBOT/txtVBAP-POSNR[0,2]").setFocus()
 session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_OVERVIEW/tabpT\02/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4411/subSUBSCREEN_TC:SAPMV45A:4912/tblSAPMV45ATCTRL_U_ERF_ANGEBOT/txtVBAP-POSNR[0,2]").caretPosition = 1
 
>> this is how i'm creating the session
SapGuiAuto = win32com.client.GetObject('SAPGUI')
application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
connection = application.Children(0)
session = connection.Children(0)

entry.title: Re: Shadow user in BTP
entry.content:
The only method I'm aware of to get "automatic user provisioning" is to utilize the create shadow user functionality.  Our team has used it inside SAP to allow us to authenticate users without requiring addition of specific scopes (and the associated manual provisioning of users). In our use case, we add a middleware function to the appprouter designed to verify that the user's e-mail is associated with a specific domain - we only have to take that extra step as our IDP can source non-SAP accounts.  There's probably variations to that you could apply as well.

Is there a reason you wish to avoid the create shadow user capability, though?

(and -- if it would help -- I can provide an example of the middleware function).

entry.title: Re: PRD: Unable to convert UTC timezone to specific Timezone
entry.content: This information is great, but where are you applying this code? (some of us only dabble in PRD enough to get by, but when it gets technical like this, I need to be spoon fed like an Engineer!)

entry.title: Re: Use of Sequence into SAP B1 / SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi nikunjmehta2290,

Check SAP KBA 3394832 for the same.

Sequence also reflects the GST Subdocument type. Refer to 

How to Work with GST in the India Localization of SAP Business One guide for the same.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support
